data.content:
Build succeeded. Here's what I changed in `DataLoader.cs`:

- Added `using System.IO.Abstractions`
- Added an `IFileSystem` constructor parameter (stored as `_fileSystem`)
- Replaced `File.ReadAllText(path)` → `_fileSystem.File.ReadAllText(path)`

The `System.IO.Abstractions` NuGet package was also added to the project. This was the only `File.ReadAllText` call in the project.
